Vidhya Arvind
AboutWritingTalksLinkedIn

Hi, I'm Vidhya 👋

I'm a Staff Software Engineer, Data Abstractions at Netflix and a founding architect of Netflix's Data Abstraction Platform — the layer that powers KeyValue, TimeSeries, Tree, Graph, and Table Metadata storage for thousands of internal developers and hundreds of mission-critical use cases.

I work on distributed databases, write-ahead logging, data deletion at scale, and reliable APIs that hide a lot of complexity. Before Netflix, I built systems at Box and Verizon.

I write on the Netflix TechBlog and speak about data abstractions and platform engineering at QCon, Cassandra Summit, Austin API Summit, and Future of Memory & Storage. You can find me on LinkedIn, GitHub, and Twitter.

  • 2024 Introducing Netflix's Key-Value Data Abstraction Layer
